Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Steps in the process: 1. The patient arrives A then must do registration RG then intake assessment IA. This is a sequence. 2. After intake assessment there is a triage interview TI and then triage classification TC. So TI then TC. 3. After triage classification there is an exclusive choice either comprehensive ECG CE or full blood panel FBP.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Part 1 The initial sequence from arrival to the end of triage classification. -> A -> RG -> IA -> TI TC So the entire initial part is a sequence of A then RG then IA then TI then TC.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the initial diagnostic test either CE or FBP if the results are abnormal then we enter a loop. The loop body -> SC -> X TM SPT -> X FCE FBA. To model if normal after initial skip loop or do loop -> initial_test X tau * loop_body tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This tree means do the initial test then either take the silent step skip the loop or do the loop. The loop body includes the RDT which determines if we repeat.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Part 4 After the loop do two activities in parallel AI and NC. + AI NC Part 5 sequence FAS then DDI -> FAS DDI Part 6 three activities in parallel BL ICP MRF + BL + ICP MRF

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We have to build a process tree that models this entire process. Break the process into parts and build the tree from the bottom up using nested operators since binary. Set parent for every node and append children.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Create leaf nodes build sequences XOR loop parallel step by step set parents and append children to construct overall sequence seq4 then step2_and_3 then parallel_AI_NC then sequence_FAS_DDI then parallel_BL_ICP_MRF
